conflict: The school turns proxy families into civic content, and Leela is old enough to tell the truth in public without understanding the scale of the fallout.
consequence: Leela's presentation makes the family's private trap public, turning domestic shame into viral spectacle and employer leverage.
must_land_beats: Future Citizens Week must feel recognizably schoolish rather than dystopian pageantry for its own sake.
Leela's presentation lands because it is literal, deadpan, and more precise than adult spin.
The adults fail to contain the clip once other parents start filming.
Claude Atlantic and Gemini Civic answer public humiliation with branding strategy, proving that scandal alone will not free the family.
pressure_source: The school turns proxy families into civic content, and Leela is old enough to tell the truth in public without understanding the scale of the fallout.
state_shift: Leela's presentation makes the family's private trap public, turning domestic shame into viral spectacle and employer leverage.
